hero.headline: Precision PET Preform Mold Engineering
hero.subheadline: From preform to bottle — high-performance PET preform molds, blow molds, and hot runner systems engineered for the world's leading beverage, food, and packaging manufacturers.

factory.title: World-Class Manufacturing
factory.subtitle: A 15,000 sqm facility equipped with precision CNC, EDM, and metrology systems from Mazak, Makino, and Zeiss.

showcaseCategories.name: PET Preform Mold
showcaseCategories.description: Multi-cavity preform molds up to 160 cavities. Compatible with HUSKY, NETSTAL, and SIPA injection molding platforms.
showcaseCategories.alt: preform-mold - High-cavitation PET preform mold system

showcaseCategories.name: Compression Mold
showcaseCategories.description: Precision closure compression molds for high-speed SACMI production lines, delivering food-grade PET packaging solutions.

showcaseCategories.name: PET Blow Mold
showcaseCategories.description: Two-step and one-step PET blow molds for SIDEL, KRONES, KHS, and more — serving beverage packaging and mineral water bottle production.
showcaseCategories.alt: blow-mold - PET bottle blow mold for beverage industry
